feature: MillenniumIT P3a — Surveillance + Instrument Groups + Off-Book
requirement: Surveillance alerts, instrument groups, off-book trade reporting

tasks.title: Surveillance + instrument groups + off-book types/stores/handlers/gateway
tasks.description:
Add surveillance alerts, instrument groups, and off-book trades to securities-service.

APPEND to src/securities-service/internal/types/types.go:

- SurveillanceAlert struct: ID, AlertType string (LARGE_TRADE/HIGH_VOLUME/PRICE_MANIPULATION/WASH_TRADE/SPOOFING), InstrumentID, Description, Severity string (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL), TriggerData map[string]interface{}, Status string (OPEN/INVESTIGATING/RESOLVED/DISMISSED), AssignedTo, TenantID, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt — json tags
- AlertThreshold struct: InstrumentID, AlertType, ThresholdValue float64, Enabled bool — json tags
- InstrumentGroup struct: ID, Name, Expression string (e.g. 'asset_class=EQUITY AND segment_id=MSE'), InstrumentIDs []string, GroupType string (EXPRESSION/MANUAL), CreatedAt — json tags
- OffBookTrade struct: ID, InstrumentID, BuyerFirmID, SellerFirmID, Price float64, Quantity int, TradeDate, ReportedBy, ReportReason, TenantID, Status string (REPORTED/CONFIRMED/REJECTED), CreatedAt — json tags

APPEND to src/securities-service/internal/store/store.go:
- SurveillanceStore interface: CreateAlert, ListAlerts(filters), UpdateAlertStatus, SetThreshold, GetThresholds(instrumentID)
- InstrumentGroupStore interface: Create, Get, List, Delete, AddInstrument, RemoveInstrument
- OffBookTradeStore interface: Create, Get, List, UpdateStatus
- InMemory implementations

Create handlers:
- handlers_surveillance.go: GET /api/v1/securities/surveillance/alerts (with ?status=, ?alert_type=, ?instrument_id=), POST /api/v1/securities/surveillance/alerts/{id}/resolve, PUT /api/v1/securities/surveillance/thresholds/{instrument_id} (set thresholds), GET /api/v1/securities/surveillance/thresholds/{instrument_id}
- handlers_instrument_group.go: GET /api/v1/securities/instrument-groups, POST create, GET /{id}, DELETE /{id}, POST /{id}/instruments (add instrument)
- handlers_off_book.go: POST /api/v1/securities/trades/off-book (validate: instrument_id, buyer/seller firm, price, quantity), GET /api/v1/securities/trades/off-book (list)

Wire into matching engine — after each trade, check surveillance thresholds:
- LARGE_TRADE: if trade.Quantity > threshold → create alert
- WASH_TRADE: if buyer == seller participant → create alert

Update server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for P3a features
tasks.description:
Write tests for surveillance, instrument groups, and off-book trades.

Tests:

1. store_test.go:
- TestSurveillanceStore_CreateAlert_List
- TestSurveillanceStore_FilterByStatus — OPEN vs RESOLVED
- TestSurveillanceStore_SetGetThresholds
- TestSurveillanceStore_ResolveAlert
- TestInstrumentGroupStore_Create_Get_Delete
- TestInstrumentGroupStore_AddRemoveInstrument
- TestOffBookTradeStore_Create_List
- TestOffBookTradeStore_UpdateStatus

2. New handler tests:
- TestListSurveillanceAlerts — create alerts, list with filters
- TestResolveAlert — resolve OPEN alert → RESOLVED
- TestSetThreshold — PUT threshold, verify value
- TestCreateInstrumentGroup — POST → 201
- TestListInstrumentGroups — create 2, list → 2
- TestSubmitOffBookTrade — POST → 201
- TestListOffBookTrades — list with filters

3. engine_test.go:
- TestSurveillance_LargeTrade — trade > threshold → alert created
- TestSurveillance_WashTrade — same participant → alert created
- TestSurveillance_NormalTrade — below threshold → no alert

Target: 70%+.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
